summary: Tested 4 UX improvements in RMS web app. All features PASS: (1) UniversalShareModal contact auto-fill with debounced search works - dropdown appears with matching contacts, clicking fills name/phone/email. (2) Keypad buttons enlarged to 88x60px with call button at 64x64px. (3) Add Contact flow redesigned with search-first approach - empty state shows New Contact button + VCF upload + recent contacts, search filters results, no-match shows create options. (4) Keypad contact matching works - typing digits shows matching contacts above keypad.

issues: Font size measured as 16px instead of expected 28px - may be a rendering difference but buttons visually appear correct size

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: UniversalShareModal searchContacts() function (lines 106-131) uses 300ms debounce and filters contacts client-side
PASS: selectContact() function (lines 133-139) correctly auto-fills name, phone, email fields
PASS: Keypad button styles (line 590) set to width: 88, height: 60 - verified via browser measurements
PASS: Add Contact modal (lines 181-264) implements search-first flow with proper empty/search/no-match states
PASS: Contact matching in keypad (lines 274-296) filters by phone number and displays above keypad
CODE QUALITY: data-testid attributes properly added: share-recipient-name, share-contact-suggestions, manual-add-contact-main, import-vcf-main, contact-search-input
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 UX improvements working correctly. Share modal contact search uses GET /api/contacts/{userId} and filters client-side with 300ms debounce. Add Contact modal has three states: empty (New Contact + VCF + recents), searching (filtered results), no-match (create options). Keypad buttons are 88x60px, call button 64x64px.

feature_1_share_modal_contact_autofill.verification: Typed 'API' in recipient name → dropdown appeared with API Test, Forest Ward, Jane Doe, TEST New Contact → clicked API Test → name filled to 'API Test', phone filled to '+15551234567'

feature_2_keypad_sizing.verification: JavaScript measurement: All 12 keypad buttons = 88x60px, Call button = 64x64px

states_verified.empty_state: Shows 'New Contact' button, 'Upload Contact File (.vcf)', 'RECENT CONTACTS' with contact list
states_verified.search_state: Typing 'API' filters to show matching contacts
states_verified.no_match_state: Typing 'ZZZNOMATCH' shows 'No matches found', 'Create New Contact', 'Upload Contact File (.vcf)'

feature_4_share_modal_from_home.verification: Clicked 'Share My Card' tile → UniversalShareModal opened with title 'Share My Card', subtitle 'Choose how to share your digital card'

feature_5_keypad_contact_matching.verification: Typed '1555' in keypad → matching contacts appeared above keypad: API Test (+15551234567), TEST New Contact (+15557459953), TEST Same Name
feature_5_keypad_contact_matching.code_location: home.tsx lines 274-296 (dialNumber filtering in keypad mode)
